# Agent.js phone utility integration (2026-03-10 10:17Z)

_**User**_

Edit the file `d:\web development\test\server\routes\agent.js` to use the shared phone utility.

Read the file first, then make these targeted changes:

1. Add this import at the top, after the existing imports:
```javascript
import { normalizePhoneForBlacklist } from '../utils/phone.js';
```

2. Remove the local `normalizePhoneForBlacklist` function definition (around lines 523-526):
```javascript
function normalizePhoneForBlacklist(raw) {
  if (raw == null || typeof raw !== 'string') return '';
  return raw.replace(/\D/g, '');
}
```

Use StrReplace to make targeted edits. Don't break anything else.

Edits to `server/routes/agent.js` are done:

1. **Import added** – `import { normalizePhoneForBlacklist } from '../utils/phone.js';` placed after the existing imports.
2. **Local function removed** – The in-file `normalizePhoneForBlacklist` definition (formerly around lines 523–526) was deleted.

The `/block-number` route now uses the shared implementation from `server/utils/phone.js`, and there are no linter errors.
